title: Baidyanath is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Baidyanath is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Baidyanath has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Gurgaon office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Baidyanath:
Baidyanath is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Baidyanath!
